message:
fix: update retryPreflight test header and add WebSocket guard assertion (#5866)

- Fix section header to say "re-blocks (fail-closed)" not "proceeds to execute"
- Add MockWebSocket.lastInstance null assertion to verify no execution side-effect

Fixes #5865

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
